description.short: AI ops assistant for the PixelTech ERP: diagnostics, RAG answers, approval-gated actions.
description.full: DevOps Commander is a multi-agent assistant for the PixelTech ERP. Ask it to investigate incidents, query the knowledge base, check service status, and run approval-gated operational actions (restart a service, delete a record) with an in-chat Approve/Reject card. Destructive actions always require explicit human approval.

commands.title: service status
commands.description: Check the status of the ERP backend service

commands.title: list customers
commands.description: List customers from the dev database

commands.title: recent app logs
commands.description: Show the most recent application logs
